message:
chore: retrigger Netlify deploy (#7877)

KUBESTELLAR_CONSOLE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY was removed from Netlify env tonight;
its total size had pushed us past AWS Lambda's 4KB env var limit and
every deploy since 01:17Z (commit 073421d) failed with 'Your environment
variables exceed the 4KB limit imposed by AWS Lambda'. Empty commit to
kick a fresh build on clean env.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
